issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage

scenarios.name: Type-safe subquery filtering published authors
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the typed Database<> generic, qualified column references (users.id, posts.author_id), and a direct subquery passed into .where('users.id', 'in', ...) matching the skill exactly; baseline omits the Database type and uses a callback subquery form.

scenarios.name: Atomic user+post insert with transaction
scenarios.rationale: Both use db.transaction().execute() with .returningAll() / .executeTakeFirstOrThrow() and reference user.id in the post insert, but treatment mirrors the skill's exact value shape and ordering.
